definition: When the market tells you the old structure is dead. Not a pullback. Not a retest. A regime shift.

steps.label: Identify the regime
steps.detail: Three weeks of Treasury accumulation. JPY tail-risk hedging. EUR anti-dollar positioning. That was the old regime.

steps.label: The exhaustion
steps.detail: Treasury adds decelerate: 225K to 165K to 75K to zero. The bid is full.

steps.label: The sweep
steps.detail: JPY longs unwound 58% in one week. EUR down 10%. Everything that defined the old regime liquidated simultaneously.

steps.label: What survived
steps.detail: AUD: +16,718 contracts. Largest CFTC build ever. Held while everything else collapsed. That's the new regime.

cotConfirmation: COT data: Treasury accumulation hit zero. JPY swept from 42,871 to 17,904. AUD held at 28,878. The hedging regime died. The commodity rotation started.
takeaway: When everything unwinds except one thing, that one thing is telling you where the next move lives.

captions.text: When the old structure dies. A regime shift.
The old regime. Buy yen. Buy euros. Accumulate duration.
Then JPY swept 58% in one week.
But AUD held. Record build. Didn't flinch.
When everything unwinds except one thing...
That thing tells you where the next move lives.
